map_npcs.name: Rival Cade
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
I guess I still can't win, huh...
...
Well, I'll be rooting for ya.
Don't screw this up!
Here, take these for the road ahead, those Crystal Caves sure are rough...{objective:Proceed through the Crystal Caves}
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Well, it's about time you made it, {player}!
I've seen what's up ahead and I don't think you're ready for it!
How about a little battle to make sure you're up to the task?

map_npcs.name: Chest
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
You opened the chest...
...but it slams itself shut!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
You opened the chest...
...but it slams itself shut!

map_npcs.name: Raider Tia
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: So, how was my audition, do I get the role?
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You'll never defeat me, the great Raider Tia!

map_npcs.name: Guard Peter
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Oh, so you *are* supposed to be here? Why didn't you say so?
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: What're you doin here? This area's restricted access only!

map_npcs.name: Researcher Kai
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Very good! I'll have to remember you...
Until then...
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Ah, hello, I've been researching some very rare Oochamon.
Care to help test their combat capabilities?

map_shops.greeting_dialogue: Welcome to my store. Buy whatever you need below!
